title: coryphopteris plumosa
intro: Coryphopteris plumosa, also known as Plumosa Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Coryphopteris plumosa include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of consuming Coryphopteris plumosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Coryphopteris plumosa is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in tinctures, ointments, and salves.
